title: AI is opt-in (zero tokens by default); CHAMP lead scoring needs BOTH product + ICP
summary: By default a site crawl spends ZERO AI tokens — contacts/compendium modes do no LLM work. Team members, company vitals, and pain points only appear when you enable them (extract_team / extract_company_info / extract_pain_points, or mode leads/full which flips them on). CHAMP lead scoring requires BOTH product_description AND icp_description together — one without the other is a 422. custom_ai_prompt requires compendium.enabled=true and at least one of system/user prompt. An empty AI section in the results usually means the feature was off, not that the data was absent — check for null before telling the user 'no team found'.
references: app/schemas/spider_site.py:232-253 — extract_* default False, product/icp optional
app/schemas/spider_site.py:133-141 — custom_ai_prompt requires a prompt when enabled
docs/services/spidersite/LEARNINGS.md:74-77 — 8B models fail ICP grading; lead-analysis uses 32B+ (server-side)
